parts.text:
Run a margin surgery analysis for Mario's Pizzeria (123 Main St, Nutley, NJ 07110). Here is their menu:

SMALL PIZZA (12"): Cheese $12, Pepperoni $14, Supreme $16
LARGE PIZZA (18"): Cheese $18, Pepperoni $21, Supreme $24
CALZONE: $13
PASTA: Spaghetti $11, Baked Ziti $13, Lasagna $15
SALADS: Garden $7, Caesar $9
SOFT DRINKS: $2
DESSERT: Cannoli $4, Tiramisu $6

Analyze food costs, identify profit leakage, and provide menu engineering recommendations. Return a JSON report.

{"overall_score": 58, "summary": "Mario's Pizzeria is losing approximately $3,200/month in recoverable profit. Food costs are running at 38% vs the restaurant industry benchmark of 28-32%. Cheese and dough are the primary cost drivers. The large pizza is underpriced relative to its ingredient cost — raising the large cheese pizza by $2 would recover significant margin. The calzone and pasta dishes offer better margins and should be promoted more aggressively.", "menu_items": [{"name": "Large Pizza - Cheese", "current_price": 18, "estimated_food_cost": 7.20, "food_cost_pct": 40, "recommended_price": 20, "margin_recovery": 2.0}, {"name": "Large Pizza - Pepperoni", "current_price": 21, "estimated_food_cost": 8.40, "food_cost_pct": 40, "recommended_price": 23, "margin_recovery": 2.0}, {"name": "Calzone", "current_price": 13, "estimated_food_cost": 3.90, "food_cost_pct": 30, "recommended_price": 13, "margin_recovery": 0}, {"name": "Spaghetti", "current_price": 11, "estimated_food_cost": 2.75, "food_cost_pct": 25, "recommended_price": 11, "margin_recovery": 0}, {"name": "Lasagna", "current_price": 15, "estimated_food_cost": 5.25, "food_cost_pct": 35, "recommended_price": 16, "margin_recovery": 1.0}], "totalLeakage": 3200, "recommendations": ["Raise large pizza prices by $2 — customers are price-insensitive at this tier", "Promote calzone and pasta (25-30% food cost) with upsell messaging", "Negotiate bulk mozzarella contract — dairy up 3.2% YoY", "Add a premium pizza tier ($28-32) with gourmet toppings to capture willing-to-pay customers", "Reduce tiramisu portion by 15% — dessert food cost currently at 42%"]}

Run a margin surgery analysis for Glow Salon & Spa (456 Oak Ave, Montclair, NJ 07042). Here is their service menu:

HAIR SERVICES: Haircut $45, Color Single Process $85, Highlights Full Head $165, Blowout $40, Treatment $55
SPA SERVICES: 60-min Facial $95, 30-min Facial $55, Mani/Pedi Combo $75, Manicure $35, Pedicure $50
ADD-ONS: Deep Conditioning $25, Scalp Massage $20, Paraffin Wax $15

Analyze service costs, identify profit leakage, and provide pricing recommendations. Return a JSON report.

{"overall_score": 65, "summary": "Glow Salon & Spa's margins are healthier than typical restaurants but there is approximately $2,100/month in recoverable profit. Color services are underpriced relative to product cost and stylist time. The 60-min facial at $95 is below the Montclair market rate of $110-120. Spa add-ons are excellent margin contributors and should be upsold more aggressively.", "menu_items": [{"name": "Color Single Process", "current_price": 85, "estimated_cost": 28, "margin_pct": 67, "recommended_price": 95, "margin_recovery": 10}, {"name": "Highlights Full Head", "current_price": 165, "estimated_cost": 55, "margin_pct": 67, "recommended_price": 180, "margin_recovery": 15}, {"name": "60-min Facial", "current_price": 95, "estimated_cost": 22, "margin_pct": 77, "recommended_price": 115, "margin_recovery": 20}, {"name": "Paraffin Wax", "current_price": 15, "estimated_cost": 2, "margin_pct": 87, "recommended_price": 20, "margin_recovery": 5}], "totalLeakage": 2100, "recommendations": ["Raise 60-min facial to $110-115 — still below Montclair market average of $120", "Increase color and highlights pricing by 10-12% — last increase was 18+ months ago", "Train staff to suggest add-ons at checkout — paraffin wax has 87% margin", "Introduce a premium 90-min facial at $155 to create an aspirational tier", "Bundle mani/pedi + facial as a spa day package at $155 (vs $170 a la carte) to increase basket size"]}
